---
title: "Download openme for macOS"
description-meta: "Download the openme macOS menu-bar app — DMG for macOS 13+."
keywords: [openme macOS download, openme mac app, openme DMG]
toc: false
css: download.css
---

{{< include _core.qmd >}}

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  renderHero("macos", false);
  renderAllPlatforms();
});
</script>
